name: Zucchini Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and oil in a large bowl.
2. Add the beaten eggs, grated zucchini, salt, flour, baking soda, nutmeg, cinnamon, raisins or dates, and walnuts to the mixture.
3. Mix all ingredients until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into two oiled loaf pans.
5. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 75 to 90 minutes.
6. Allow the loaves to cool before removing them from the pans.
